configurePresets.name: msvc-release
configurePresets.description: Windows Release build. All deps static via vcpkg x64-windows-static (static libraries + static CRT; first configure takes minutes, then binary-cached). Bootstrap external/vcpkg/bootstrap-vcpkg.bat and configure from an MSVC vcvarsall x64 environment.

configurePresets.name: msvc-debug
configurePresets.description: Windows Debug build (static via vcpkg x64-windows-static). WARNING: unoptimized -- the 3D physics/FFT tests take minutes; use for stepping through code.

configurePresets.name: linux-release
configurePresets.description: Linux Release build. Deps static via vcpkg x64-linux (static libraries; glibc stays dynamic, as is standard on Linux). Portable AVX2 (bitwise-reproducible oracles). SDL3 needs the system X11/Wayland dev headers. Bootstrap external/vcpkg/bootstrap-vcpkg.sh first.

configurePresets.name: linux-clang22
configurePresets.description: linux-release pinned to LLVM clang 22 by PATH name (clang++-22). Use where the default clang++ resolves to AOCC: its clang-17 base cannot constant-evaluate libstdc++ 15's C++20 constexpr std::complex arithmetic (complex_test fails), and this project pins portable AVX2 anyway, so AOCC's Zen tuning buys nothing here.

configurePresets.name: linux-debug
configurePresets.description: Linux Debug build (static via vcpkg x64-linux). WARNING: unoptimized -- the 3D physics/FFT tests take minutes.
